issues.detail: Skill does not explicitly cover error handling or edge cases.
Skill contains verbose comments and explanations that may be unnecessary.

scenarios.name: render.yaml for web + worker + Postgres
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses render.yaml with fromDatabase.property: connectionString, generateValue: true for JWT_SECRET, healthCheckPath, and autoscaling with targetMemoryPercent/targetCPUPercent; baseline gives a barebones YAML without service-to-database wiring or autoscale.

scenarios.name: Trigger deploy via Render API
scenarios.rationale: Treatment POSTs to https://api.render.com/v1/services/{id}/deploys with Bearer auth and clearCache body; baseline calls a hypothetical webhook or invents a non-existent CLI.
